data.body: Not all paths (success AND failure) require a --add-handoff-capsule with full agent metadata. planning.md and shipment.md have NO handoff capsule at all. All skills' failure modes use bare --add-note without a handoff capsule. Every state transition path should include --add-handoff-capsule with all agent metadata args.
data.title: Audit skill prompts: require handoff capsules with full agent metadata on all paths
